_note: Provisional seed batch for the ORACLE knowledge base (§9.4). Cases are drawn from public fact-check and news reporting. Every figure below reflects widely-documented public-record reporting, but the content team MUST verify each stat_value against its cited source and replace section URLs with exact article links before production launch (PRD §13.2, §34). Per the seed rule, every claim has >=1 origin and >=1 damage record; the KB intentionally contains only false/misleading claims (true claims carry no 'damage' and surface via the fact-check fallback instead).

claims.text: 5G mobile networks cause or spread the coronavirus.

mutations.text: 5G towers weaken your immune system so the virus can spread.
They are installing 5G while we are locked down to spread the virus.

damage.stat_label: Mobile masts attacked in the UK
damage.description: At least ~90 telecom masts were set on fire or vandalised across the UK during April-May 2020, with engineers threatened.
The 5G-COVID theory was tracked circulating in at least 20 countries.

claims.text: Child kidnappers are roaming the area — this gang was caught abducting children, forward to warn everyone.

mutations.text: Organ-harvesting gang spotted nearby, do not let children out alone.

damage.description: At least ~20 people were beaten to death by mobs in India in 2018 after false child-abduction rumours spread on WhatsApp.

claims.text: Dominion voting machines switched millions of votes from Trump to Biden in the 2020 US election.

mutations.text: Dominion software has an algorithm that flips votes, it was used in Venezuela.

damage.description: Fox News agreed to pay Dominion Voting Systems $787.5 million in April 2023 to settle a defamation suit over these false claims.

claims.text: The Sandy Hook school shooting was a staged hoax using crisis actors.

mutations.text: No one really died at Sandy Hook, the parents are actors.

damage.stat_label: Defamation damages ordered against the promoter (USD)
damage.description: A Connecticut jury ordered Alex Jones to pay roughly $1.4 billion in 2022 to Sandy Hook families he had defamed and whose harassment he fuelled.

claims.text: The MMR vaccine causes autism in children.

mutations.text: Doctors hide that the MMR shot triggers autism.

damage.stat_label: Measles cases in the 2014-15 Disneyland outbreak
damage.description: The US CDC linked 147 measles cases to a December 2014 Disneyland outbreak amid falling vaccination driven by this debunked claim; the original 1998 study was retracted in 2010.

claims.text: Chloroquine and hydroxychloroquine are a proven cure for COVID-19.

mutations.text: Take chloroquine at the first sign of symptoms to beat COVID.

damage.description: An Arizona man died in March 2020 after ingesting chloroquine phosphate (an aquarium additive), believing it would prevent COVID-19.
Nigerian health authorities reported cases of chloroquine poisoning within days of the false-cure claims spreading in March 2020.

claims.text: Drinking or bathing in salt water protects you from Ebola.

damage.description: At least two people in Nigeria died and around twenty were hospitalised in August 2014 after drinking large amounts of salt water believing it cured Ebola.

claims.text: A Washington DC pizza restaurant is the front for a child-trafficking ring run by politicians.

damage.description: In December 2016 a man fired a rifle inside the restaurant while 'self-investigating' the false conspiracy; he was later sentenced to four years in prison.

claims.text: COVID-19 vaccines contain microchips designed to track people.

mutations.text: The vaccine is a cover to inject tracking nanochips.

damage.stat_label: Share of US adults who believed the microchip claim (%)
damage.description: A May 2020 YouGov survey found about 28% of US adults believed Bill Gates wanted to use vaccines to implant trackable microchips.

claims.text: The 'Momo' character is hacking children's apps and telling them to harm themselves.

mutations.text: Momo is appearing in kids' YouTube videos giving dangerous instructions.

damage.stat_label: Verified deaths directly linked to the 'challenge'
damage.description: Despite worldwide school and police warnings, safety charities and journalists found no confirmed cases of harm — a documented moral panic amplified by the shares themselves.
